name: integration_acquisition_microsaas_idea_email_deli
method: [ACQUISITION] MicroSaaS idea: email deliverability checker. Thoughts?

phases.name: build_core
steps: RBL blacklist scanner: check 50+ lists via dns.resolver
SMTP validation: MX record + connection test

phases.name: build_product
steps: Static HTML frontend with fetch() calls to Python backend
Stripe freemium gate (10 checks/day free, $9/mo unlimited)
Wire into cold outbound pipeline as pre-send hook

phases.name: deploy_distribute
steps: Add to email-tools-compared landing page as featured tool
Submit to IndieHackers + r/microsaas + ProductHunt (when account created)
Add cron: nightly self-check on our own cold outbound domains
